meta.title: GRAEWE GmbH – Extrusion Technology & Mechanical Engineering
meta.description: GRAEWE is a sought-after brand in the world of extrusion technology. Planning, development, manufacturing and assembly of extrusion machines.

whoIsGraewe.title: Graewe is a sought-after brand in the world of extrusion technology.
whoIsGraewe.subtitle: Because we know how to turn ideas into practice.
whoIsGraewe.p1: For over 40 years, we have been a key driving force in the modern plastics industry in the planning, development, manufacturing, and assembly of plants, machines, and successor machines. With creative and effective concepts and solutions, we have developed into one of the leading suppliers of extrusion machines on the world market.
whoIsGraewe.p2: Our customers particularly appreciate the individual, benefit-oriented concepts and solutions that we competently implement with an excellent price-performance ratio.
whoIsGraewe.p3: The success of our products and services, as well as the success of our customers and partners, confirms our commitment to consistently customer-oriented thinking and action.

whatDoesGraewe.title: Graewe is a competent partner for the modern plastics industry.
whatDoesGraewe.subtitle: Because we have the right solution for almost every application.
whatDoesGraewe.p1: The Graewe product range is as diverse as the tasks that need to be mastered in the plastics processing industry.
whatDoesGraewe.p2: You will find special know-how with us in the field of machine technology for pipes, profiles, and sheets.
whatDoesGraewe.p3: Flexibility and reliability of the technology are guarantees with which Graewe has made a name for itself in recent years. Whether special multifunctionality, space-saving solutions, or very specific requirement profiles: you will always benefit from Graewe's tailor-made results.

whatDoesGraeweStandFor.title: Graewe stands for profitability, flexibility, and reliability.
whatDoesGraeweStandFor.subtitle: Because cost-effectiveness comes first for our customers.
whatDoesGraeweStandFor.p1: We deliver machines that can be adapted to individual needs while avoiding unnecessary costs - with high output rates, low maintenance and service costs, long service life with optimal operating performance, process reliability, and short development times.

graeweGroup.title: The Graewe Group
graeweGroup.subtitle: A strong network for your requirements.
graeweGroup.p1: GRAEWE GmbH was founded in 1981 and develops, designs and manufactures downstream extrusion equipment for pipe and profile production.
graeweGroup.p2: We also deal in the buying and selling of used machines for the plastics industry. For this purpose, the company next, Neuenburger Extrusionstechnik GmbH, was founded.

pipeExtrusion.title: Pipe Extrusion
pipeExtrusion.description: The extrusion of pipes and tubes is our specialty. The applications are as diverse as our customers' innovations.

profileExtrusion.title: Profile Extrusion
profileExtrusion.description: Our machines are used in the production of profiles. We offer tailor-made solutions for profile extrusion.
profileExtrusion.usedAs: Our machines are used in the production of profiles as:
usedAsList: Window profiles, main and secondary profiles
profileExtrusion.applications: The application areas are as diverse as our customers' innovations:

sheetExtrusion.title: Sheet Extrusion
sheetExtrusion.description: Sheet systems from Graewe are tailored to application requirements. This allows the optimal use of available technology.
sheetExtrusion.p2: Our customer-oriented thinking and working is reflected in the success of our products and services. But also in the lasting success of our customers and partners.

maplast.text: It is not easy to find an honest source in the world specially for used equipment and when I started to look for second hand extrusion machines in Europe and I searched all around but finally I was very lucky since I choosed Graewe from the start, they gave me that good feeling to go ahead from the start considering that I was in South America and I was not able to fly to Europe all the time so I needed a company I could rely on blind which is not easy since there are many pirates out there in the market only looking at your pocket. This happened quite a long time ago and along the years besides the commercial link we have established a close personal relationship so I can totally rely on their technical capacity and honesty and in some cases when they do not have what you need they will help you to find a source without any further interest at all. Graewe is the kind of company hard to find you can deal directly with the owners, the respond quickly to your requirements big or small, technically capable, fair prices, responsible, honest. I would give them the highest 5 star rating. Finally my very personal opinion is that behind all this there is a fantastic family with all the required values to make them one of the best companies in Germany on whatever plastic business you start or plan to develop.
maplast.author: David Lebed

asg.text: Throughout the past few years in doing business with Graewe/Next machines, they were never short of exceeding our expectations. Their professional team were very punctual and never compromised the quality of their delivered goods. Personally, the flexibility of the management team and their understanding to the needs of the customers were paramount. Costumed solutions were always available which made things much easier in buying decisions. It has always been a pleasure buying from Graewe and will always be.
asg.author: Ahmed A. Alsharif, Chairman & CEO

usedMachines.title: Used Machines
usedMachines.subtitle: ..the sensible investment for optimal extrusion.
usedMachines.intro: Extrusion machines are a major investment for any company - a new machine is not always the best solution. To help you meet all your requirements optimally, there is next: We offer you used extrusion systems at the best conditions.
usedMachines.reasonsTitle: Many good reasons speak for the use of professional next used machines:
reasons: Quick replacement in case of machine failure
usedMachines.overhaulsText: All used machines at next are thoroughly tested and refurbished - that is our guarantee to you and comes from the best house. Behind next stands over 25 years of extrusion know-how from GRAEWE, the experienced provider of innovative extrusion technology.

calculator.title: Product Calculator
calculator.intro: Satisfied customers are the benchmark by which we measure ourselves. It is therefore important to us that you receive excellent service quality. No matter where you are in the world, we will help you immediately.
calculator.disclaimer: Calculated winding lengths may deviate by up to 10%. We assume no liability for the accuracy of the results.

items.excerpt: Strong construction activity is driving demand for plastic pipes and profiles – our customers are scaling production.
